page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: An optimised re-implementation of the call-methylation and eventalign modules in Nanopolish.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: GPU Accelerated Adaptive Banded Event Alignment for Rapid Comparative Nanopore Signal Analysis | Re-engineered and optimised Nanopolish call-methylation module (supports CUDA acceleration) | An optimised re-implementation of the call-methylation module in Nanopolish. Given a set of basecalled Nanopore reads and the raw signals, f5c detects the methylated cytosine bases. f5c can optionally utilise NVIDIA graphics cards for acceleration

Given a set of basecalled Nanopore reads and the raw signals, f5c detects the methylated cytosine bases. f5c can optionally utilise NVIDIA graphics cards for acceleration
